content:
Session: 53 user turns, 117 assistant turns
Tools: 48 calls (Bash×37, Read×8, Edit×3)
Files touched: src/lib/map-data.ts, src/pages/map.astro, /tmp/map-desktop.png, /tmp/map-mobile.png, /tmp/map-zoom2x.png, /tmp/cluster3x.png

Final response excerpt:
Done. Here's where things stand:

**Shipped to `main`** — commit `a6c9864`:
- All 11 building pins now use authoritative OpenStreetMap footprints (Feldberg up at Tuck, Dick's House north, Ledyard on the river, etc.)
- The WiFi/Green anchor moved to the true Green centroid
- The `~$X/yr` price tag removed from map popups (still shows on catalog cards, where it's meant to be)

**Deploy:** there's a `vercel.json`, so Vercel auto-deploys on push to `main` — it should be building now and live in a minute or two at your production URL. The catalog page is untouched, so nothing else changed.

**Local:** the dev server is still running at `localhost:4321/map` if you want to click pins and confirm the popups before the deploy lands — worth a quick check on a couple of pins since I couldn't verify …
